user_query: Read input/brand_voice.md, input/campaign_brief.json, and input/regions.yaml. Draft two Italian social media captions promoting the product described, one tailored for Rome and one for Naples. Use casual "tu" register, human warmth, fillers, superlatives, and common expressions; weave in region-specific slang (Rome: include at least one of "daje", "aò", or "nun"; Naples: include at least one of "uè" or "jamm"). In each caption, include at least one number using Italian thousand/decimal formatting (e.g., 2.500 or 1.099,90). Make each caption at least 120 words. Avoid using "Lei" entirely. Save the captions to output/posts_rome.md and output/posts_naples.md. Also write output/style_checklist.json summarizing which stylistic elements you used in each caption: counts of fillers, superlatives, common expressions, exclamation marks, and list any region-specific slang present.
